response.text:

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: r4c0 is sole reciprocal ally in critical distress (10% SoC, repeated urgent requests). Micro-share of 0.30–0.35 kWh now may unlock inbound aid before r3c0 hits autonomy floor. Maintain 25% SoC floor (0.75 kWh) for survival margin. Cluster-wide deficit; r3c1 and r2c0 defensive..
